title: Pathfinder / Beastwarden / survival-exploration talent cleanup

scope.request: Next batch after T24: Pathfinder / Beastwarden / survival-exploration trees

implementationNotes: Safe Zone and Pathfinder follow-on talents no longer mutate the owner with cover, Reflex, attack, or recovery bonuses. They are zone/ally/enemy context cards and reference rules.

Beastwarden talents no longer apply fake Will/Reflex/attack modifiers. Beast attitude, bonded mount, and companion mechanics are surfaced as action/reference cards for the existing companion and reaction/action surfaces.
Survivor movement and area-damage talents are metadata-cleaned. Evasion remains owned by the existing area attack damage flow, while Sprint/Surefooted are movement context rules.
Reconnaissance team talents are follower-context actions/references instead of owner attack modifiers.
Deep-Space Gambit is now registered with the ReactionEngine as a once-per-encounter incoming-attack reaction.
remainingLimitations: Safe Zone placement and zone occupancy are not yet map-token automated; cards intentionally preserve GM/player zone adjudication.
Animal Companion and Reconnaissance Team Leader still depend on follower/companion creation workflows rather than direct compendium mutation from the talent item.
Deep-Space Gambit can surface and report through the reaction engine, but actual attack reroll mutation depends on the attack-card event bridge supporting reroll replacement.
Calming Aura source text remains incomplete in the current compendium; this phase removed the unsafe fake modifier and flagged it as source-text review instead of inventing mechanics.
